completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: web (React 19.2.4 PWA + TS 5.9.3 + Vite 7.3.1 + Supabase 2.99.0 + Zustand 5.0.11 + Tailwind 4.2.1 + Zod 4.3.6)
Found 103 existing doc files in docs/, 207 source files in src/ (45,054 lines), 85 test files in tests/, 24 SQL migrations, 19 CI workflows, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md
Tech stack: React 19.2.4, TS 5.9.3, Vite 7.3.1, Zustand 5.0.11, Supabase 2.99.0, Tailwind 4.2.1, Framer Motion 12.35.2, Zod 4.3.6, Sentry 10.42.0, Vitest 4.0.17, Playwright 1.58.2

4 parallel agents completed exhaustive scan: Agent A (project-overview 9 files + architecture 20 files + source-tree 8 files), Agent B (api-reference 16 files + data-models 11 files), Agent C (component-inventory 9 files + state-management 13 files incl new auth-slice.md), Agent D (development-guide 15 files + performance 2 files)
Master index.md updated: added auth-slice.md, corrected migration count to 24, CI workflow count to 19, updated timestamps and version
Validation: No '(To be generated)' markers found. No TBD/TODO/Pending placeholder markers found.

Finalized. 104 markdown files across 10 sections. Key changes from prior scan: authSlice added as 11th slice, logger utility documented, SoloReadingFlow 4 sub-hooks, auth centralization, realtimeChannel.ts, useFocusTrap, migration count 23->24, CI workflow count 18->19, tsc -b switch

changes: logger utility added (src/utils/logger.ts) replacing console.log across 48 files
authSlice added as 11th Zustand slice for centralized user identity
auth centralized into actionService + sessionService facade
